name: Deluxe Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cans Artichoke hearts, chilled and drained (8 oz. each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop 2 green peppers; cut the remaining pepper into rings.
2. Combine chopped green peppers, potatoes, celery, salt, pepper, mayonnaise, and mustard in a large bowl; mix well and chill thoroughly.
3. Spoon the potato salad onto a large serving platter.
4. Arrange stuffed eggs and artichoke hearts around the edge of the platter.
5. Garnish the salad with green pepper rings, olive slices, pickles, and parsley.
6. For the stuffed eggs: Cut the eggs in half lengthwise; remove the yolks.
7. Mash the yolks; stir in mayonnaise, onion, curry powder, salt, and pepper.
8. Fill the egg whites with the yolk mixture and chill.
9. Sprinkle half of the stuffed eggs with paprika and top with a small sprig of fresh parsley.
10. Top the remaining stuffed eggs with pimiento-stuffed olive slices.
Yield: 18 servings.
